settings.dialog_description: We validate the endpoint before saving. If the test passes, you can use it as primary or mirror.
settings.set_primary_desc: New media uploads will go to this server first.
settings.add_mirror_desc: The app will try BUD-04 and fall back to direct upload if needed.
settings.card_description: Choose where uploads go first and which servers act as fallback in generated events.
settings.helper: The app uploads to the primary first. Mirrors try PUT /mirror following BUD-04 and, if that fails, try direct upload. Only successful mirrors are added as fallbacks in video events.
settings.invalid_url: Use a valid http(s) URL for the Blossom server.
settings.server_unreachable: The Blossom server did not respond correctly.
